reasoning: Both models incorrectly skipped PKGBUILD as a binary file, preventing any meaningful audit. PKGBUILD is critical for assessing build/install behavior.
coverage_issues: PKGBUILD skipped entirely by both models
No review of install hooks or build scripts
false_negatives: Potential risks in PKGBUILD (build commands, source validation)
Untrusted source handling in package functions
learnings: Fix binary file detection: PKGBUILD should never be skipped as binary
Prioritize PKGBUILD/.install files even if other files are skipped
Add fallback mechanism when critical files are misclassified
Improve pre-audit checks to validate file types before processing
